name: enVVeno Medical Corp
summary: Overview enVVeno Medical Corporation is a medical device company focused on the advancement of innovative bioprosthetic (tissue-based) solutions to improve the standard of care for the treatment of venous disease. Chronic Venous Disease (CVD) is the worlds most prevalent chronic disease, impacting approximately 70% of the adult population of the U.S. Chronic Venous Insufficiency (CVI), is a large subset of CVD, which most often occurs when valves inside of the veins of the leg become damaged, re...
